title: Stealing The Villagers
description: Want to steal loot from villagers? Use the powerful "Shears of Steal" to cut open their pockets and grab their treasures!
body:
## Intro : Steal Loot from Villagers in Minecraft Add a new layer of **villager interaction** with the *Stealing The Villagers* mod! This mod allows players to **loot villagers' pockets** using a unique item called the **Shear of Steal**. Cut the pockets of villagers and collect the loot that falls out, with consequences for your actions. ### Key Features: - **Steal Loot from Villagers**: Use the **Shear of Steal** item (right-click) on any villager to steal their loot. Each villager has a unique loot table based on their profession, offering a variety of rewards. - **Reputation System**: Stealing from villagers comes with a cost! Stealing loot from a villager will reduce your reputation by **-50 points**. By default, you cannot steal from villagers with **less than -25 reputation**, but you can customize this in the configuration. - **Compatible with Mods**: Works seamlessly with mods like **More Villagers** and **Better Villages**, expanding the possibilities for looting and creating new interactions in your Minecraft world. - **Customizable Loot Tables**: If you want to modify or add new loot tables, the mod allows full customization. You can check the sources on **GitHub** to modify the loot tables and even suggest new loot tables if you feel something’s missing. ### Features Summary: - **Steal Loot** from villagers with unique loot tables for each profession. - **Negative Reputation** for stealing actions; manage the reputation points and set your limits. - **Customizable Loot Tables** via GitHub. - **Compatible** with popular mods like **More Villagers** and **Better Villages**. Perfect for **players who enjoy loot**, **reputation-based gameplay**, and **enhanced villager interactions**. ## Discover More Amazing Mods! Enjoy this mod? Don’t miss future updates! Click the Follow button on the project page to get notified when new content is released. 💚🚀 ## Partners : This project is proudly supported by BisectHosting. Check out their services to easily host your projects with quality and reliability.

## Call to Action : Have questions? Need help? Join us on Discord or visit our GitHub to get involved with the community and contribute!
